label: DC1
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) explicitly name: 'Dendritic Cells 1 and 2 (DC1, DC2)'. DC1 corresponds to the classical type 1 dendritic cell (cDC1) subset characterised by CLEC9A, XCR1, and CD141 expression. Reynolds et al. note: 'enrichment of gene signatures for murine splenic Xcr1+DC (DC1)'. Note: DC1_fetal.md already exists; this report is for the adult DC1 population only.
